item.title: Forget World Peace, We Need World Amazing
item.description: World Peace will never work. World Amazing is the only solution to humanity's issues. We need a world where everything is amazing for everyone from the moment they begin to exist in this world. That's how to fix anything and everything.

item.title: World Piece of Pizza Day
item.description: Can humanity do anything together? Could we even share a meal together? A day where everyone worldwide takes a break from whatever they're doing and has some pizza? You're invited, will you join in having some pizza?

item.title: Intro to Cloggy
item.description: On Xwitter you Xweet. On Threads you Thread. And on Cloggy you SHIT. Coming soon, a place where everyone can post SHIT (Special High Intensity Transmissions). No ads. No monthly subscriptions. No need to log in to see SHIT. Just SHIT.
